steps.title: Find the forward-looking signal
steps.content: The key signal is the closing phrase: “they are hopeful that this discovery could aid in the development of new antibiotics for human use.” This shows the passage is not just reporting what was discovered but pointing toward where the discovery might lead—future research directions.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B says the text “summarizes research findings and then identifies an area for further research,” which is exactly this structure: the passage presents the ants' abilities and results, then points toward developing antibiotics.

The other choices mischaracterize the passage —
  • A wrongly imposes a problem-solution frame
  • C invokes evolutionary explanation never discussed
  • D falsely claims the passage explains research methodology
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
